response.justification: The candidate is technically an excellent match — deep TypeScript/Node.js and React experience, Kubernetes and AWS exposure, and current hands-on LLM/MCP work covering nearly every nice-to-have. However, this is an entry-level position and he is a Staff/Senior engineer with roughly 15+ years of experience, creating a substantial overqualification risk around compensation expectations, engagement, and retention. Worth a conversation only if he has clearly signaled interest in this level of role; otherwise the seniority mismatch is likely disqualifying.
strengths: Strong TypeScript, Node.js, and React fullstack experience directly matching the core stack
Covers most nice-to-haves: LLM/MCP integration work, Kubernetes deployments, AWS (CDK)
Berlin-based with a track record of product ownership, testing culture, and mentoring
concerns: Significantly overqualified for an entry-level role; retention and salary-fit risk
No explicit PostgreSQL or NestJS experience (MongoDB/MySQL and other frameworks instead)
Only basic German, which may matter for a German energy-consulting domain and on-site collaboration
